title: HTML Templating Engine
scenario: Design a prompt to generate an HTML templating engine using a template language. The engine should allow users to define templates using placeholders and render them with data from a JSON object. The output should include the complete HTML templating engine code, with the rendering logic correctly implemented. The prompt should be under 150 words and use present tense.
constraints: Must use a template language for HTML templating
Must include error handling for invalid template syntax

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the output meets the constraints.
Verify the output templating engine logic and error handling.
